basic_info.description: I'm Aditya Pathak. Machine Learning Engineer | AI Enthusiast | 2+ Years Experience. I specialize in building scalable ML systems using Python, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. I enjoy solving real-world problems using data and deploying intelligent solutions.

projects.title: Movie Recommender System
projects.description: Engineered a content-based recommendation engine using NLP and Cosine Similarity to analyze movie metadata, achieving a 92% matching accuracy in identifying and suggesting relevant content clusters.

projects.title: Speech Recognition through Emotions
projects.description: Developed a Speech Emotion Recognition system using CNN and MLP architectures to classify 8 distinct emotions from the RAVDESS dataset, achieving a 91% accuracy rate through advanced MFCC and Mel-spectrogram feature extraction.

projects.title: Face Mask Detection using CNN
projects.description: Developed a real-time computer vision system using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and OpenCV to detect face mask compliance, achieving 98% detection accuracy across live webcam streams and varied lighting conditions.
